MDCL_SRGCL_STRL_AMT 
LABEL: 
Medical/Surgical Sterile Supplies Amount ($) 
DESCRIPTION: The charge amount (rounded to whole dollars) for the medical/surgical sterile supplies related to the 
beneficiary's stay.
